markers.evidence_type: encodes CD161, innate lymphocyte marker, scRNA-seq
ILC marker, differentiates ILC from NK, scRNA-seq

other_findings.finding: ILC1/3 reflects known ILC1-ILC3 plasticity in adult human skin
Adult skin ILC3 correlates with fetal skin ILCs that express IL7R+, RORC+ and KIT+
ILC1 are identified as CD161(KLRB1)+ CD3(CD3D/CD3G)- to distinguish them from T cells

evidence_quotes.quote: Plasticity within ILC1 and ILC3 is also recognized, as reflected in our annotation of ILC1/3
